name: clickhouse-cloud-pp-mcp
description: Printing Press CLI for Clickhouse Cloud.

clickhouse_cloud_password.title: CLICKHOUSE_CLOUD_PASSWORD
clickhouse_cloud_password.description: Sets CLICKHOUSE_CLOUD_PASSWORD for the Clickhouse Cloud MCP server. Get a credential from https://clickhouse.com/docs/cloud/manage/openapi.

clickhouse_cloud_username.title: CLICKHOUSE_CLOUD_USERNAME
clickhouse_cloud_username.description: Sets CLICKHOUSE_CLOUD_USERNAME for the Clickhouse Cloud MCP server. Get a credential from https://clickhouse.com/docs/cloud/manage/openapi.
